creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/a836774703facd9ab8b7bfd64ab1c6116631cdeb#diff-648043cd2a25f35f6aa95eae7c2f6ceec84bd2d0bb3c2f3b9995dd66c45f45c1R266-R272> appears OK, no excess white space. 

The corresponding warning under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/cutting-edge/#freebsdupdate-upgrade> appears to have excess white space after each of the two bullet points.
